div.div:
Regional map-data maintenance
Geofabrik Malaysia/Singapore/Brunei PBF → Valhalla monthly rebuild; future Nominatim replication remains disabled.

div.div:
Trust boundary
Only ports 80/443 are public. Ports 8002/8080 stay inside Docker. GEO_SERVICE_TOKEN exists only in Vercel server environments and Caddy runtime.

div.div:
Current versus future
Solid path: routing-only Valhalla pilot on the Singapore Droplet. Dashed path: larger combined Nominatim + Valhalla deployment after capacity approval.
